subcodes.first_line: The fountain of pure water hath flowed forth, and the Way hath been made manifest, while the Guide proclaimeth betwixt the heavens and the earth that which He desireth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد جری السلسبیل و ظهر السبیل و الدلیل ینادی بین السموات و الارضین انه مااراد
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
